title: teucrium francisci-werneri
intro: Teucrium francisci-werneri, also known as the Turkish germander, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and diterpenes, which have shown antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Teucrium francisci-werneri include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and depression, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
